Selected Work

Stores built for the future.

R
● Liveroyal-sea-eg.com
Premium Seafood Commerce

Royal Sea

Problem

How do you sell high-end seafood online without the store itself feeling cheap?

Outcome

A bilingual store: 38 products, full Arabic and English, and a checkout that stays out of the way.

Brand ExperienceCommerce ArchitectureCatalog Design
Visit Website↗
M
● Livemedieval-aloud.com
Luxury Fragrance Brand

Medieval Aloud

Problem

A luxury oud and musk brand nobody could find in Gulf search — with product copy that read generic.

Outcome

Rewrote the brand voice, built SEO around how the Gulf actually searches, and gave it a storefront that reads like a boutique.

Luxury PositioningBrand VoiceSearch Architecture
Visit Website↗
S
● Liveseafood-mood.com
Seafood Commerce Platform

Seafood Mood

Problem

Fresh seafood stock changes by the day — and a static cart turns that into failed orders and delivery chaos.

Outcome

A store that tracks stock live, sends order updates over WhatsApp, and keeps the whole order flow digital.

Platform DesignOperational FlowInventory Systems
Visit Website↗
U
● Liveunited-ffv.com
B2B Fresh Produce Supplier

UNITED

Problem

A B2B produce supplier running wholesale over WhatsApp and phone calls — wrong invoices, expired stock, and no real visibility.

Outcome

Took the whole supply chain digital: a contract-pricing portal, automatic PDF invoices, and warehouse packing lists.

B2B InfrastructureSupply Chain SystemsOperational Automation
Visit Website↗
P
● Livepantoufla.com
Lifestyle Footwear Brand

Pantoufla

Problem

A Cairo footwear brand starting from zero — no identity, no store, no plan.

Outcome

Brand identity, a Shopify store, and a bilingual catalog — all built in six weeks.

Brand IdentityCommerce LaunchGo-to-Market
Visit Website↗
F
● Livealhoot-eg.com
Headless Shopify B2B Dashboard

The Fishmonger / Al Hoot

Problem

A wholesale seafood operation running manual orders through WhatsApp — no real-time inventory visibility, no structured purchasing flow for B2B buyers.

Outcome

Delivered a headless Shopify B2B dashboard: real-time inventory, wholesale price tiers, dedicated buyer accounts, and custom order workflows — all synced to Shopify's admin.

Headless ShopifyB2B CommerceCustom Dashboard
Visit Website↗
Core Disciplines

Disciplines built for growth.

01 / SERVICE DETAILS

Product Strategy & Positioning

Before any design starts, we define what the product should be, how it's priced, and who it's for. Every decision that follows depends on getting this right.

Proficiency & Tools
Market Discovery92%
Pricing Architecture88%
Product Thinking95%
Est. Cairo, EG
Available
Lokalita Monogram30.0444° N, 31.2357° E
About Studio

Partners in commerce.

Lokalita is a specialized Shopify commerce partner. We build custom-designed stores engineered from scratch to fit your specific product catalog and operational logistics.

Royal Sea, Pantoufla, UNITED... real online stores we've built to look premium, load fast on mobile screens, and serve as reliable operational tools.

Shopify PartnerCustom StorefrontsPerformance MarketingLocal Payments IntegrationConversion OptimizationBilingual Operations
Our Approach

A system for building storefronts.

🔍
01

Discovery & Context

We audit your current operations, understand your margins, and define the core problem your storefront must solve.

📋
02

Pricing & Strategy

Before design, we define catalog architecture, local checkout requirements, and how shipping and pricing align.

🎨
03

Identity & Interface

We design a high-end interface that is optimized for conversion, making sure it visually matches the product's value.

💻
04

Shopify Engineering

We code custom Shopify Liquid setups, optimize assets for fast mobile load speeds, and integrate payments.

🚀
05

Go-to-Market Launch

We set up tracking analytics, verify domain routing, and execute a structured checklist for a smooth go-live.

📈
06

Data-Driven Growth

We scale acquisition via performance campaigns and optimize conversion rates based on real buyer actions.

Client Proof

Real feedback from partners.

Get In Touch Today

Ready to build your store with Lokalita?

Let's align on a short call to review your product catalog, local fulfillment requirements, and customized launch strategy.

Send us a message to start→● Typically replies in 4 hours
